replacements.originalText: Extend Cursor with Skills, Rules, Agents, Hooks, and MCPs
replacements.changeText: 通过技能、规则、智能体、Hooks 和 MCP 扩展 Cursor

replacements.originalText: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality
replacements.changeText: 简化并精炼代码以提升清晰度、一致性和可维护性，同时保留全部功能的智能体

replacements.originalText: Simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving all functionality. Focuses on recently modified code unless instructed otherwise.
replacements.changeText: 简化并精炼代码以提升清晰度、一致性和可维护性，同时保留全部功能。默认聚焦最近修改的代码，除非另有说明。

replacements.originalText: Cursor plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, intent-driven search, and native Cursor v1.7+ hook routing for context protection.
replacements.changeText: 可节省约 98% 上下文窗口的 Cursor 插件。支持 11 种语言沙箱执行、FTS5 知识库（BM25 排序）、意图驱动搜索，以及 Cursor v1.7+ 原生 Hook 路由以保护上下文。

replacements.originalText: This plugin is managed by a VS Code extension
replacements.changeText: 此插件由 VS Code 扩展管理

replacements.originalText: Plugin configuration is managed by your team
replacements.changeText: 插件配置由你的团队管理

replacements.originalText: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring
replacements.changeText: 使用多个专用智能体对 Pull Request 进行自动化代码审查，并基于置信度评分
审查 Pull Request 代码

replacements.originalText: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests
replacements.changeText: 通过简单命令简化 Git 工作流：提交、推送和创建 Pull Request

replacements.originalText: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples
replacements.changeText: Upstash Context7 MCP 服务器，用于查询最新文档。拉取特定版本的文档与代码示例

replacements.originalText: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation
replacements.changeText: 用于 UI/UX 实现的前端设计技能

replacements.originalText: Official GitHub MCP server for repository management. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories
replacements.changeText: 官方 GitHub MCP 服务器，用于仓库管理：创建 Issue、管理 PR、审查代码、搜索仓库

replacements.originalText: Security review for Claude-generated code. Pattern-based warnings on edits, LLM-powered diff review on Stop, and an agent
replacements.changeText: 对 Claude 生成代码的安全审查：编辑时模式警告、停止时 LLM 差异审查及智能体分析
